docket_entries.description: COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING OF DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT HELD ON OCT-07-2010, IN DEPT. 304. COUNSEL SUBMITS ORAL ARGUMENTS. THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRERS TO COMPLAINT, WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER JOE VICKSTEIN; DEPT. 304.

ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-10-495912, CGC-10-495916, CGC-10-496437, CGC-10-496438, CGC-10-499083 WITH CASE CGC-10-495911, ORDER; ALL FURTHER ENTRIES UNDER CASE CGC-10-495911

NOT REPORTED. COMPLEX LITIGATION HEARING RE DEMURRERS, PREVIOUSLY SET FOR AUG-06-2010, IS CONTINUED TO OCT-07-2010, AT 1:30 PM, IN DEPT. 304 AT THE PARTIES REQUEST. COUNSEL TO SEND NOTICE. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER, CLERK FELICIA GREEN, DEPT. 304.

THE COURT ORDERS THE CONSOLIDATION OF CASE(S): CGC-10-495911; CGC-10-495912; CGC-10-495916; CGC-10-496437; CGC-10-496438; AND CGC-10-499083, FOR ALL PURPOSES. ALL FURTHER ENTRIES SHALL BE FILED IN LEAD CASE, CGC-10-495911.
